title: Edge Note Transition
prompt:
Create a production-ready Edge Note Transition using React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. Create a two-state content handoff where a narrow rose edge note slides in beside a white document sheet as the reader changes from Draft to Reviewed. The incoming sheet should reveal a short status paragraph while the edge note changes its number, producing a clear transition that also makes sense when paused. Use a #F4F5F6 surround, #ECECEE borders, 22px corners, soft neutral shadow, #111111 headings, and #4A4A4F supporting text. Rose is the only bright accent. Do not use gradients on the card or a transition that hides the state label.

Use a single semantic button with aria-pressed and a polite live region that announces the active sheet. Click, Enter, and Space toggle between the same two states. The button is at least 44px and has a visible 3px dark focus ring. Hover lifts it 2px over 180ms and press compresses it 1px over 90ms. Slide the edge note and sheet with a spring using stiffness 310 and damping 27; crossfade text over 180ms. Both states must have explicit titles and readable static layouts, even under reduced motion. Use local React state only, with no timers, random values, browser storage, remote assets, or network calls.

At 320px, preserve the sheet content and keep the rose note narrow. In larger detail previews, let the sheet breathe without unrelated interface elements. Maintain AA contrast, logical tab order, and clear labels beyond color. Prefer transform and opacity. Honor prefers-reduced-motion with an immediate swap or a 120ms fade. Return complete TypeScript React client code and a runnable pure CSS approximation with suggested HTML.

code.css:
/* Suggested HTML:
Draft
*/ .uiwiki-edge article{padding:20px;border:1px solid #ececee;border-left:28px solid #fb7185;border-radius:16px;background:#fff}.uiwiki-edge button{min-height:44px;width:100%;margin-top:16px;border:0;border-radius:12px;background:#111;color:#fff;font-weight:800;transition:transform 180ms ease}.uiwiki-edge button:hover{transform:translateY(-2px)}.uiwiki-edge button:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #111;outline-offset:3px}@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.uiwiki-edge button{transition:none}}

demoCode:
(() => {function Demo(){const [r,setR]=React.useState(false);const l=r?'Reviewed':'Draft';return
SHEET 0{r?2:1}{l}

{r?'Notes reconciled and approved.':'Notes await editorial pass.'}

}return ;})()
